# API Checklist: Search by Address in the Map UI

**Purpose**: Validate search API contracts for autocomplete and geocoding.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/024-address-map-search/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Autocomplete Contract

- [x] CHK-API-001 Autocomplete endpoint accepts partial query and returns ranked suggestions.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Suggestions include full address and confidence when available.

## Geocode Contract

- [x] CHK-API-003 Resolve endpoint returns canonical address and coordinates.
- [x] CHK-API-004 Ambiguous results include candidate list for user selection.
- [x] CHK-API-005 Out-of-coverage responses set coverage status.

## Error States

- [x] CHK-API-006 Invalid query returns HTTP 400 and guidance.
- [x] CHK-API-007 Geocoding outage returns HTTP 503.
